user_query: I am planning a trip and would like to track a specific aircraft with the ICAO HEX code 'EFGH'. Can you fetch the live positioning of this aircraft? Additionally, provide the details of the aircraft based on its ICAO HEX code.

TaskList.description: Fetch the live positioning of the aircraft with ICAO HEX code 'EFGH'.
Retrieve the details of the aircraft based on its ICAO HEX code 'EFGH'.
